positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a wise, mythical creature—a blend of an owl, an arctic fox, and crystalline geometry. The creature is perched majestically on a stylized, winding forest branch. The background is a dramatic, gradient wash of deep indigo, sapphire, and ethereal teal, creating strong contrast against the subject. The main subject should have clean, sharp silhouettes and intricate geometric feather patterns. Style: Neo-Art Deco mixed with modern botanical line art. Composition: Central, vertically focused, ideal for a t-shirt graphic. Lighting: Dramatic, backlit edge lighting emphasizing the crystalline elements. Color Palette: Limited to deep blues, icy white, gold leaf accents, and teal. Highly detailed, vector quality, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, grain, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, smudge, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, photorealistic, messy, uninspired
